# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Harness layer

```text
[ ] Rails
[ ] Brakes
[ ] Sensors
[ ] Quality
[ ] Runtime
[ ] Docs / examples
```

## Verification

```text
[ ] python -m pytest
[ ] Example scripts still run if changed
[ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
```

## Safety checklist

```text
[ ] No secrets, tokens, API keys, or private logs added
[ ] No bypass for rails or brakes introduced
[ ] Sensor payloads do not log sensitive data
[ ] Quality checks remain explicit and testable
```
